violations.description: Primary outbound flow is covered, but deeper failure-mode assertions (provider outages, refusal payload UX) are limited at E2E level.
violations.suggestion: Add explicit negative-flow E2E assertions for dispatch refusal and transient provider failure UX messaging.
violations.code_snippet: '[G2-AUTO-E2E-205][P1] inbox send-message and make-call actions launch neighbor workflows and submit outbound requests @P1',

violations.description: Actor-context boundary is validated, but additional malformed actor/header variants are not exhaustively covered in this suite.
violations.suggestion: Add malformed/partial actor-context permutations to tighten boundary regression detection.
violations.code_snippet: '[G2-AUTO-API-301][P0] mine bucket refuses reads when actor context is missing to preserve actor-owned queue isolation @P0',

violations.description: Responsive behavior is functionally asserted, but no explicit performance thresholds are asserted for breakpoint transitions.
violations.suggestion: Optionally add lightweight perf/timing assertions for key layout transitions in CI-safe ranges.
violations.code_snippet: '[G2-AUTO-E2E-203][P0] responsive queue-to-thread behavior uses mobile full-screen thread tablet split layout and desktop three-column workflow @P0',

untested_user_paths: E2E refusal/error path UX for outbound dispatch
missing_error_scenarios: Malformed actor-context permutations beyond whitespace-only user-id

recommendations: Add explicit negative E2E dispatch-refusal assertions.
Expand API boundary variants for actor-context malformed inputs.
Consider optional performance NFR checks for responsive transitions.
summary: Coverage is strong for g.2 acceptance behaviors with limited medium-depth gaps in negative-path breadth.
